faded_password_note.name: Faded Password Note
faded_password_note.description: A crumpled sticky note from the coat rack jacket. Partially legible: 'Srv rm pw: adm_n1___'. The rest is smudged beyond recognition. Someone else might know the full password.

umbrella.name: Umbrella
umbrella.description: A forgotten umbrella from the coat rack. It's one of those cheap collapsible ones that breaks the second it actually rains. You never know though.

supply_closet_code.name: Supply Closet Code
supply_closet_code.description: A sticky note from Priya. '1-9-9-7.' The year the system was deployed. Of course it is.

laptop.name: Laptop
laptop.description: A brand new government-issue laptop, still in its plastic wrap. It's not a MacBook, but it'll compile code. That's all I need.
